Localization.Description: An attempt to change the password of a user to an unencrypted password is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} made an attempt to change the password of a user on host {event_src.host} to an unencrypted password
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} changed the password of a user on host {event_src.host} to an unencrypted password
